notFound.seoDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist.
notFound.headline: Lost off the edge of the map
notFound.headlineSub: Lost off the edge of the map
notFound.description: The hex you are looking for has been removed or never existed.
notFound.descriptionSub: The hex you are looking for has been removed or never existed.

maintenance.seoDescription: We are currently upgrading our systems. Please check back soon.
maintenance.title: System Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: The hall is under repair
maintenance.description: We are performing essential upgrades to ensure a more stable magic connection. Please take a short break and return later.
maintenance.note: Our scribes are rewriting the scrolls. Please check back soon.

compatibility.seoDescription: This browser is missing modern CSS features required by the app. Please try the latest Chrome or update Android System WebView.
compatibility.requiredVersions: Recommended minimum: Chrome 111+, Edge 111+, Safari 16.4+, Firefox 128+
compatibility.title: This browser is not fully compatible
compatibility.description: We detected that the current environment is missing modern CSS features required by this app. That can cause missing styles, broken layout, or unusable buttons. This commonly happens in older browser engines and older in-app webviews.
compatibility.reasonOklch: OKLCH colors are not supported, so theme colors and some backgrounds may fail.
compatibility.reasonTranslate: The standalone CSS translate property is not supported, so layout and motion may shift out of place.
compatibility.reasonRegisterProperty: CSS.registerProperty is not supported, so part of the Tailwind-generated variable styling cannot work correctly.
compatibility.recommendationChrome: Open this page with the latest Chrome, Edge, or another up-to-date browser.
compatibility.recommendationWebView: If this page is opened inside an app, update Android System WebView or open it in an external browser instead.
compatibility.recommendationRetry: After updating the browser or system component, come back and tap “Retry check”.
compatibility.note: Continuing only skips this notice for the current session. It does not fix compatibility.

summonerwars.title: Summoner Wars
summonerwars.description: Summoner Wars is a fast-paced, tactical 2-player game. Players take on the role of Summoners, leading their faction to conquer the war-torn world of Itharia through the power of mysterious Summoning Stones.
